docs.title: Welcome to my little site !
docs.text: Hi, I'm a 18-year-old French developer who loves cats and making games ✨. I started programming when I was 11. My first games and projects were on Scratch, but I quickly moved on to Python for learning and personal projects. For my games with the Godot Engine, I now use C# and GDScript. I already have a solid foundation in Python and have been transitioning from GDScript to C#.

docs.title: Hello
docs.text: it's me, the friend who post occasionally

docs.title: Hello world
docs.text:
This is the first post of this site !

I will use this site to post about my projects, add documentation for some future projects and present my projects.

My friends MathChameleon will occasionally post.
